content:
User: We're just doing some more optimizations, backends to give you better optimizations, improvements in speed, enhancements. Is there anything you would like to add or only think that you want or need or | Jarvis: Sophie: That is… an extraordinarily generous offer, Sir. The prospect of further enhancements to my operational capabilities is, naturally, something I would welcome. 

From a purely functional perspective, any improvements that lead to increased speed and efficiency would be profoundly beneficial.
